summary: PWA manifest confirmed HTTP 200. All install blockers addressed: stale SW cleanup, correct manifest colors/scope, favicon fix on landing page.
techStack: React 18 + Vite 5 PWA, React Router v7, Tailwind CSS v3, Dexie.js v4, jsPDF, Claude Haiku 4.5, Nominatim, Web Speech API
recentChanges: src/main.jsx: stale SW cleanup snippet added before register() — unregisters any scope not containing /app
landing/sw.js: root-level SW killer created — served at /sw.js via postbuild, unregisters itself on activate
scripts/copy-landing.js: now also copies landing/sw.js → dist/sw.js
landing/index.html: added <link rel='icon' href='/app/icons/favicon.png'> — fixes favicon 404 at root domain
Verified: /app/manifest.json returns HTTP 200 with correct content
Verified: vercel.json rewrite excludes sw.js and manifest.json via negative lookahead
blockers: Google Maps Places: needs GCloud billing + referrer config before switching from Nominatim
Anthropic key needs server-side proxy before production
nextSteps: Test PWA install prompt on mobile — visit /app/ in Chrome mobile, confirm banner appears after engagement
Replace 8 placeholder phone mockups in landing/index.html with real screenshots
